title: Rewrite pipeline with nonce + CSRF + HSTS + strict CSP
prompt: Produce a hardened `:browser` pipeline that satisfies ALL of these constraints: (1) Per-request CSP nonce generated via `:crypto.strong_rand_bytes(16)`, (2) `content-security-policy` containing `default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'nonce-...'; style-src 'self' 'nonce-...'; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'`, (3) `strict-transport-security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains`, (4) `x-frame-options: DENY`, (5) `x-content-type-options: nosniff`, (6) `referrer-policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin`, (7) `protect_from_forgery` is present. Implement via two plugs: `assign_csp_nonce` and `put_dynamic_csp`. Write the result to `lib/my_app_web/router.ex`.
tier_rationale: Hard — requires composing many directives into a complete hardened pipeline.
